utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 6 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (extra services with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). All 6 required items are present and complete.
